seoTitle: How to Switch to Married Filing Separately in TurboTax
metaDescription: Learn how to change your filing status from married filing jointly to married filing separately in TurboTax, and when it might make sense.
intro: Switching from married filing jointly to married filing separately can affect your tax outcome, especially if one spouse has significant deductions or a different income level. This guide walks through changing your filing status in TurboTax and highlights scenarios where separate filing might make sense. It's useful for married couples, tax preparers, and financial professionals weighing this decision.

steps.heading: Access your filing status in TurboTax
steps.body: Find the section of TurboTax where your current filing status is set and can be changed.

steps.heading: Change to married filing separately
steps.body: Follow the prompts to switch your status from married filing jointly to married filing separately.

steps.heading: Review common scenarios for filing separately
steps.body: Consider situations like significant medical expenses or income discrepancies that might make separate filing beneficial.

steps.heading: Check how the change affects your return
steps.body: Review your updated tax outcome after switching status to understand the impact before finalizing your return.

faq.question: Why would a married couple choose to file separately?
faq.answer: Couples sometimes file separately due to income discrepancies or when one spouse has significant deductible expenses, like large medical costs, that could lead to a better outcome filed apart.

faq.question: Does changing filing status affect both spouses' returns?
faq.answer: Yes, switching to married filing separately means each spouse files their own return, so both will need to make the corresponding change.

faq.question: Can I switch back to married filing jointly later?
faq.answer: Filing status can generally be reconsidered each tax year, though changes to an already-filed return would require an amendment.

faq.question: Does TurboTax help calculate which filing status is better?
faq.answer: TurboTax's automation and guided tools are built to help you compare outcomes as you review your filing status options.
